name: python3-maxminddb
title: python3-maxminddb
summary: Python 3 module for reading the MaxMind DB format
description:
Python 3 module for reading the MaxMind DB format
This is a Python module for reading MaxMind DB files. The module includes both
a pure Python reader and an optional C extension.
.
MaxMind DB is a binary file format that stores data indexed by IP address
subnets (IPv4 or IPv6).
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-maxminddb because Python 3 module for reading the MaxMind DB format.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-maxminddb as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-maxminddb with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-maxminddb --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
